method.name: set_destination
method.description: Sets a destination object which becomes to a target to jump when the outline is clicked. Error codes - EC_INVALID_OUTLINE - An invalid outline handle was set. - EC_INVALID_DESTINATION - An invalid destination handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: set_opened
method.description: Sets whether this node is opened or not when the outline is displayed for the first time. Error codes - EC_INVALID_OUTLINE - An invalid outline handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.
